RM220/#1 JUDGE:DONNA LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. COUNSEL STERRETT BRANDT PRESENT ON BEHALF OF PLTF AND WITH PROPERTY MGR MS. WASHINGTON, DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL ROSALIE DAVIS. AN AGREEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED AND READ INTO THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEMALU, ASOFIAFIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1790 SUNNYDALE AVENUE, SAN FRAN, CALIFORNIA $1,639.35 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,639.35, LEASE FORFEITED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
